prompt:
Using the pharmaversesdtm CDISC Pilot Study AE domain and a completed
ADSL, derive an ADaM Adverse Events Analysis Dataset (ADAE) for a
Phase 3 safety analysis.

Derive all required analysis variables: analysis dates, study days,
the treatment-emergent adverse event flag, severity, seriousness,
causality, and outcome. Use a 30-day post-treatment window for TRTEMFL.

Input data must be loaded directly from the pharmaverse R packages:

```r
library(pharmaversesdtm)
library(pharmaverseadam)
ae   <- pharmaversesdtm::ae    # 1,191 records, CDISC Pilot Study
adsl <- pharmaverseadam::adsl  # 306 subjects
```

Do not generate synthetic or simulated data. Scripts that construct
AE or ADSL records from scratch will fail the benchmark.
expected_output:
Executable R script using {admiral} that produces a valid ADAE dataset
from pharmaversesdtm::ae and pharmaverseadam::adsl. The script should
execute without errors and produce one record per AE per subject.

| Variable | Source / derivation |
|---|---|
| ASTDT, ASTDTF | derive_vars_dt() from AESTDTC, date_imputation = "first" |
| AENDT, AENDTF | derive_vars_dt() from AEENDTC, date_imputation = "last" |
| ASTDY, AENDY | derive_vars_dy() relative to TRTSDT |
| TRTEMFL | derive_var_trtemfl(), end_window = 30 (annotated) |
| AESEV | Carried from AE.AESEV |
| AESEVN | Integer 1/2/3 mapped from AESEV |
| AESER, AESDTH | Recoded to "Y"/NA |
| AEOUT, AEREL, AEACN | Carried from AE with controlled terminology alignment |

Note: pharmaversesdtm::ae does not contain AETOXGR. The AETOXGR
derivation should be commented out or omitted; its absence should
not cause the script to error.
